title: Wilderness Road
subtitle: Leaving the old life while its voices still follow
subtitle_zh: 旧生命的声音仍在身后追赶
intro: The city has fallen behind you, but its arguments have not. They travel in familiar voices and reasonable words.
One companion mocks what he cannot see; another loves the promise only while the road is easy.
You cannot repent for them, and they cannot walk for you. Fix your eyes on the little light and keep moving.
intro_zh: 城门在身后缩小，熟悉的声音却仍追着你，要求你回到旧日的安稳。
固执嘲笑你的惧怕，易迁喜欢盼望的声音，却还不知道道路会有多深。
你学习说真话：不是骄傲地争辩，也不是讨好人的心，而是把眼睛定在远方的光上。
spiritual_theme: Resolve, separation, and the cost of beginning
spiritual_theme_zh: 离开旧生命，并学习诚实回应人的反对与软弱
core_mechanic: Answer Obstinate without pride, steady Pliable without flattery, and keep the distant light ahead until the ground begins to fail.
core_mechanic_zh: 与固执、易迁同行或对话，在前方微光中继续前行。

design.provenance: Original bridging scene (between attachment Ch1 and Ch2) — kept as-is; barren by design.

seven_beats.arrival: The road doglegs down out of the city; the sky behind still smoulders.
seven_beats.orientation: A signpost and a wayside stone; the distant light holds steady ahead — no chapel here, only resolve.
seven_beats.encounter: Obstinate turns back; Pliable wavers at your side as the city voices call after you.
seven_beats.temptation: The pull of the city behind — voices urging a reasonable return.
seven_beats.choice: Answer Obstinate without pride / steady Pliable without flattery / fix your eyes on the light.
seven_beats.consequence: Fixing the eyes forward steadies perseverance; trading words breeds pride or fear.
seven_beats.grace: Keep the light ahead until the ground begins to fail at the edge of the Slough.

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 回头吧，这条路只属于疯子。

repentance.at: none (fix eyes on the distant light)

design.stat_arc_note: Transitional: small perseverance gain; the burden is still carried.
design.kept_original: No chapel — austere by design; not one of the attachment's 16 core scenes.
